title: rubus × obuncus
intro: Rubus × obuncus, also known as the blackthorn, is a hybrid plant of the Rubus genus, derived from the cross between Rubus fruticosus and Rubus laciniatus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its high content of salicylic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × obuncus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
